title: Cambridge South East Transport route: Transport and Works Act order
body: "Application by Cambridge South East Transport (CSET) for a public transport route between a new travel hub near the A11 to A1307 and the Cambridge Biomedical Campus. The CSET2 scheme would, if approved, the CSET2 scheme would provide:   a new high quality guided busway bus priority improvements a new ‘park and ride’/travel hub new high-quality cycling and walking facilities that make use of the emergency and maintenance access track required for the new guided busway   Application details  The application is being made under the Transport and Works Act 1992.   order: The GPC Cambridge South East Transport application status: live application date of application: 9 January 2025 applicant: Cambridge County Council and Greater Cambridge Partnership (via Womble Bond Dickinson (UK) LLP)   "
